tasks.subject: Task 1: entity_icon storage + queries + URL helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** entity_icon table + sqlc queries + pure entityIconURL helper.

**Files:** db/migrations/019_entity_icon.sql, db/queries/entity_icon.sql (+regen pkg/db/), pkg/server/entity_icon_url.go (+_test.go)

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/019_entity_icon.sql","db/queries/entity_icon.sql","pkg/server/entity_icon_url.go","pkg/server/entity_icon_url_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run EntityIconURL -v","acceptanceCriteria":["5 queries generate","entityIconURL empty->\"\" else /icon/<kind>/<escaped id>?v=<etag8>"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Admin upload/delete icon endpoints + owner-delete cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-entity PUT/DELETE …/icon (reuse branding.ProcessIcon); delete icon row on owner delete.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_admin_entity_icon.go (new), server.go (6 routes), handle_admin_oidc_clients.go/handle_admin_saml_sps.go/handle_admin_upstream_idps.go (cleanup), admin_route_policy_test.go (3 DELETEs)

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_admin_entity_icon.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_oidc_clients.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_saml_sps.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps.go","pkg/server/admin_route_policy_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run AdminMutationRoutesRequireSudo -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["PUT stores icon (admin+fresh sudo), 404 unknown owner","3 DELETE sudo-gated remove row","owner delete removes icon row","policy test passes with 3 DELETEs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Public icon serve GET /icon/{kind}/{id}
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Serve stored PNG publicly with ETag/304/404/400.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_entity_icon.go (new), server.go (public route)

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_entity_icon.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["200 image/png+ETag+Cache-Control","304 on If-None-Match","404 no icon, 400 bad kind"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Expose iconUrl in contracts + builders
tasks.description:
**Goal:** IconURL on FederationProvider (federation list join) + the 4 admin GET views.

**Files:** pkg/contract/auth.go (5 views), pkg/server/entity_icon_url.go (ptr+lookup), handle_federation.go(+test), handle_admin_oidc_clients.go/forward_auth_apps.go/saml_sps.go/upstream_idps.go

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/entity_icon_url.go","pkg/server/handle_federation.go","pkg/server/handle_federation_test.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_oidc_clients.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_saml_sps.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run FederationProviders -v","acceptanceCriteria":["/auth/federation returns iconUrl per provider","each admin GET view returns iconUrl","federation test asserts IconURL set/nil"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AppIcon + EntityIconUpload + admin detail views + i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AppIcon + EntityIconUpload (mirror SettingsView icon block), wire into 4 admin detail views, en/zh, dist.

**Files:** components/custom/AppIcon.vue(+test), EntityIconUpload.vue(+test), 4 Admin*DetailView.vue, locales/en.ts+zh.ts, pkg/webui/dist

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/AppIcon.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppIcon.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/EntityIconUpload.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/EntityIconUpload.test.ts","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminOidcClientDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminSamlProviderDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b && npm run test -- --run && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["AppIcon img-or-initial","EntityIconUpload upload/remove via withSudo; forward-auth uses oidc-applications base","4 detail views show icon card","FE gate + parity pass; en.ts apostrophe-clean; dist rebuilt"]}
```
